subcodes.first_line: In these days, news hath been received from Ṭihrán that the beloved friends, through the guidance of the Hands of the Cause of God, upon them be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ایام استخبار از طهران گشته که احباء بدلالت حضرات ایادی امرالله علیهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @relationship between government and people, @Hands of the Cause, @elections
